overall.description: Cinematic third-person game footage of a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain valley with a lake at golden hour. The scene features dramatic backlighting from the sun behind snow-capped peaks, with birds flying across the sky and the character's cloak billowing gently in the wind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with panoramic vista

events.description: flock of birds enters frame from left, flying across the sky
character shifts weight and cloak billows in the wind

agents.ego_description: hooded player character stands at cliff edge, gazing out at the mountain vista with minimal movement

entered.detail: player character in tattered cloak standing on cliff edge, back to camera
tall mountain peak with snow cap, silhouetted against golden sunlight
calm body of water in the valley below reflecting the golden light
dense trees covering the valley floor between cliff and lake
stone outcrop where character stands, with wooden post on left
small flock of birds flying across the sky

segments.scene_description: A solitary hooded figure stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a breathtaking mountain valley at golden hour. The sun sets behind a snow-capped peak, casting warm rays across the scene and illuminating the lake below. Birds fly across the vast sky as the character's cloak billows gently in the wind, creating a contemplative and atmospheric moment in this open-world game environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a contemplative moment on a rocky precipice that emphasizes the vast scale of a mountain valley during the golden hour. It begins with a close focus on a solitary hooded figure standing at the cliff's edge, where the character's cloak billows gently in the wind. As the camera lingers, the perspective expands to reveal a breathtaking vista of snow-capped peaks with the sun setting directly behind them. The scene then opens further to illuminate a shimmering lake below, while birds glide across the warm, ray-filled sky to complete the atmospheric landscape.
